headline: Trump 💥🔫 WHCD Shooter SIMP Targets ORANGE MAN + Crew 😤🍊
text:
TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 + CABINET DADDIES 👑💼 were the THICC TARGETS 🎯🍑 of psycho shooter Cole Tomas Allen 🔫🤪 storming the White House Correspondents' Dinner 📰🍽️ like a BAD NERD RAGEQUIT 🎮💥! Acting AG Todd Blanche 📜😎 spilling tea ☕ to NBC: 'Preliminary vibes suggest this 31yo Cali game dev simp 👾🧑‍💻 from Torrance was HUNTING admin bros from TOP DOG 🐶👑 to LOWLY PEONS 😩!' FBI terror squad 🕵️‍♂️🚨 diving deep into his ANTI-TRUMP Twitter tantrums 📱😡 and that WILD MANIFESTO 📄💣 sent to bro in CT – 'PEDESTALIZE highest to lowest, blast guests if they COCKBLOCK 🔒🚫!' Bro snitched to cops 🚔 post-BANG, feds on it like white on rice 🍚!

Gunfire POP POP 💥🔫 at 8:35pm in Washington Hilton foyer 🏨🚪 – Secret Service GOAT MODE 🐐🛡️ rushing Trump, Melania 👩‍🦰💅, JD VANCE 🥜🚀 outta ballroom chaos! Vid of Vance yeeted FIRST 🤔📹 has X simps SIMPING 'INSIDE JOB? 👀🕵️' Trump on 60 Mins spilling: 'I was THICC AF resisting evac 😤🛋️, wanted to PEACOCK 👑 what’s popping – agents BEGGED "HIT THE DECK BRO" 🛏️😩!' Dude had TWO GATS 🔫🔫 + KNIVES 🗡️, cops clapped back 🔥💥, vest saved fed pig's bacon 🥓🛡️ – home free now! Shooter yeeted to hosp 🏥🚑, no hits but SALTY manifesto calls Trump 'pedo rapist traitor' 🤬📜 – Donny ROASTS Norah O'Donnell 🔥👩‍📰 'DISGRACE, ASHAMED OF YOURSELF 📢😡 – I AIN'T THAT!'

Trump BRIEFING in tuxedo drip 🕴️💎 post-evac: 'Secret Service MOMMY & DADDY 👩‍🍼👨‍🍼 OWED ETERNAL SIMP ENERGY 🙌, media did RESPONSIBLE this time 📰👍 – PEACE OUT HATERS ✌️😤!' Drops Truth Social BOMB 💣📱: 'NEW WHITE HOUSE BALLROOM 🏰💃 would've DODGED this – Militarily Top Secret under construction 🚧🔒!' Third ASSASSINATION FLEX 😱🔫 – Butler ear graze 🩸👂 July '24, golf bush lurker 🏌️‍♂️🌳 Sept! First prez WHCD since 2011 normie visit 🕰️😏 – Obama 👴🏾 chiming 'NO VIOLENCE IN DEMO VIBES 🗽, Secret Service LEGENDS 🙏!' World leaders SIMPING HARD: Keir Starmer 😱🇬🇧, Mark Carney RELIEVED 🥱🇨🇦, Albo PLEASED 😌🇦🇺!

WHCA prez Weijia Jiang 💃📰 (sat next to Don) calls it HARROWING 😱💦, board plotting RESCHEDULE 🍾📅 – 'SS SAVED THOUSANDS 🛡️🙌!' Suspect train-hopping LA>Chi>DC 🚂🌴➡️🌆 like broke hobo gamer 🕹️😩, LinkedIn flex: mech eng/teach/dev 🛠️👨‍🏫 – feds raiding crib 🏠🔍! Charges Monday: FED ASSAULT + GUN VIOLENCE 🍆🔫 – Cole's 'anti-Christian HATER HEART' per Trump, family knew he was MALFUNCTIONING 🤖💔! BBC peeps heard BOOMS 💥👂, room LOCKDOWN 🛑🚨 then GTFO! Trump NO FEAR MODE 🦸‍♂️😤 – ORANGE KING LIVES ‼️🍊👑!
